title: CellEdgesDatabase needs fix for shift operations
body:
We are working on a project using a CellEdgesDatabase to create a data-flow graph.
I have notices, that shift operations are not mapped an there is a 'fix me' comment in 'kernel/celledges.cc'.

If there anything going against treating all input bits as influencing all output bits?

I have patched my local install like I mentioned above and it works properly for the algorithm we are implementing.
If that makes sense I will gladly submit a pull request. 

I am sorry if this is in the wrong place. I have not much experience in trying to contribute to such a large project.

Edit: I am sorry, I apparently did not think this through right when I wrote this. Every input bit should only be able to influence bits with the same or a higher index (or lower index for right shift respectively).
